g.text: agent loops re-send the transcript every step: an n-step run sends 1 + 2 + ... + n prompt units
per-step prompt, steps 1..6 -> whole transcript again: O(n^2)
the four levers on the curve
measured (B2, 10 steps): input 637 -> 953 tok/step (+38%); 21% of the bill was re-reading text already sent
